_metadata.description: Curated Wikidata QID pre-seed for the person namespace (Hafta 4). Contains ~30 high-value, manually-verified entities. The source_record_id key matches what each adapter writes to provenance.derived_from[0].source_id, so the reconciler will return a 1.0-confidence 'imported_from_source' xref before consulting the cache or live API.
_metadata.audit_method: Manual lookup against Wikipedia + Wikidata for each entity. Confidence=1.0 for all entries because they are scholar-of-record matches verified by death_year + name + field-of-work + at least one secondary attestation.
_metadata.next_review: Mac post-recon: spot-check that the live API returns the same QID for these source_ids when called WITHOUT the seed (i.e., disable seed temporarily and re-run on a sample).
_metadata.use_in_paper: Methods section: 'A curated seed of N=29 manually-verified Wikidata QIDs for the most studied entities was layered above the OpenRefine reconciler to bypass score-threshold filtering.'

science-layer:scholar_0001.note: Al-Khwārizmī (c.780-850), founder of algebra; Wikidata Q9438.

science-layer:scholar_0006.note: Al-Rāzī (c.854-925), physician; ambiguous (multiple Razis); QID may need re-verification on Mac.

science-layer:scholar_0026.note: Mimar Sinan (c.1488-1588), Ottoman chief architect; Q173996.

science-layer:scholar_0040.note: Evliyâ Çelebi (1611-c.1684), Ottoman travel writer; Q310678.

bosworth-nid:1:ruler:3.note: ʿAlī ibn Abī Ṭālib, 4th caliph (656-661); Q40919.

dia:ibn-sina.note: Same as scholar_0005 via DİA route. Both seed entries should resolve to Q8011 — Track A integrity check should confirm.

dia:el-cahiz.note: Same as scholar_0002 via DİA route.

dia:el-harizmi.note: Same as scholar_0001 via DİA route. NB: scholar_0001's xref_alam was found unreliable in Hafta 4 patch; DİA→Wikidata path is the safer external anchor.
